If the Sonic/SpongeBob/Goku/Vegeta/Omni Saiyan fusion character were to fight Saitama from the manga, it would be an interesting battle of power.

Saitama is a formidable opponent with raw strength and speed that is nearly unparalleled. However, the Sonic/SpongeBob/Goku/Vegeta/Omni Saiyan character has a range of abilities, forms, and allies that would make them a unique challenge for Saitama.

The fused character's speed and agility would allow them to keep up with Saitama's movements, while their immense strength and Chaos powers would allow them to deal significant damage to him. They could also switch between various forms and abilities, such as Super Shadic or Ultra Sonic, to keep Saitama guessing and on defense.

However, Saitama's power cannot be underestimated, as he has the ability to defeat any foe with just a single punch. It is still possible that he could find a weakness in the Sonic/SpongeBob/Goku/Vegeta/Omni Saiyan fusion character and defeat them with one blow.

Overall, the battle between the Sonic/SpongeBob/Goku/Vegeta/Omni Saiyan fusion character and Saitama could go either way.
